title: carpinus orientalis
intro: Carpinus orientalis, also known as the oriental hornbeam, is a deciduous tree species native to Eastern Europe and Asia. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carpinus orientalis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
